text:
Cursor 回应：承认用了开源基座舆论发酵后，Cursor 开发者体验副总裁 Lee Robinson 在 X 上做出了官方回应。
https://t.co/w5851OMk4r

他承认 Composer 2 确实基于一个开源基座模型构建，但强调最终模型只有约四分之一的算力来自基座，其余都是 Cursor 自己的训练。

他还表示 Cursor

1995 年，《仙剑奇侠传》横空出世，赵灵儿、李逍遥、水墨画风，把整个中文游戏圈炸了。所有人都在等续作。

结果一等就是八年。

2025 年 1 月，DeepSeek R1 发布，用极低成本训练出能和 OpenAI 掰手腕的推理模型，英伟达股价大跌，硅谷集体失眠。 https://t.co/hD8Tw0IfVh
Has us beat https://t.co/EaJeP74s5c

This is a cool, practical technique for increasing AI idea diversity by adding random priming phrases & bits of end words

Similar prompts produce similar ideas, but since LLMs attend more to the start & end of inputs, this approach pushes towards novelty https://t.co/wwIPSRoFjs https://t.co/AcwGiCNzxo

Okay I have been converted to the Grok Imagine Chibi trend ✨

It makes every photo so cute. https://t.co/5neAbicTAJ

Happy Friday from New York! 

I hope you are creating some great stuff and remember: 

you are excellent! https://t.co/MtoV0HuQw0

RT @xxx111god: Seriously? PUA Coding 8.9k stars？
说白了这就是不会懂的人给自己找的安慰剂

不会拆任务 不会给上下文 不会设计工作流
不会搭 memory 不会写 skill 不会做验证
整个 agent 系统从头到尾没建起来…

"I do think the way that we work and when we work and how we work is going to change in the AI era."

"Voice dictation has blown up in enterprises."

"It started with vibe coding where engineers would just talk https://t.co/Rwu3Dr1CjH

Palantir CTO Shyam Sankar joins a16z's Katherine Boyle and Erik Torenberg to discuss Shyam's new book, Mobilize, as well as defense, AI, the SaaSpocalypse, and more.

Our recent work using object-centered spatial information for better generalization 🦾

针对为什么没有点名 KIMI 的质疑，Lee 随后发了第二条推文，这次直接点了名："KIMI K2.5"，承认这就是 Composer 2 的基座模型，并重申 Cursor 正在通过推理合作伙伴（比如 Fireworks）的条款遵守许可证，还表示个人对开源模型心怀感激。
https://t.co/g43eTaZDvA

问了下 Claude

接下来做一组 skill 发布到 GitHub —— dbskill https://t.co/jsEaZjD9Sa
